description: A wanted-poster graphic on a red and dark background headed WANTED, SE BUSCA INFORMACION. A grid of ten numbered booking-style portraits of men is arranged in two rows, each labeled with a number and a name. A banner at the bottom reads MENSAJE DE TEXTO CON WHATSAPP and a phone number, beside a Se Busca logo and a QR code.
notable_text: WANTED; SE BUSCA INFORMACION; MENSAJE DE TEXTO CON WHATSAPP; (830) 313-4557
